message:
fix(web): use visual viewport API for iOS-safe element positioning

Updates multiple components to use the visualViewport API for correct
positioning when the iOS keyboard is visible or when the viewport is
otherwise constrained. This ensures tooltips, HUDs, and popovers
remain visible and properly positioned.

Components updated:

App.tsx:
- Use var(--vvh) for mobile sequence view height
- Ensures sequence view doesn't extend behind iOS keyboard

Model3DView.tsx:
- Use var(--vvh) as fallback for fullscreen 3D model height when dvh
  is not supported (older browsers)
- Add prefetching for phages with multiple PDB structures via
  usePrefetchAdjacentStructures hook - preloads additional structures
  in the background to reduce loading time when switching views

AminoAcidHUD.tsx:
- Use visualViewport API to get true visible area dimensions
- Calculate position bounds using viewport offset for keyboard handling
- Add safe-area-inset support for maxWidth on notched devices
- Ensure HUD never clips behind keyboard or notch

GeneMapCanvas.tsx:
- Use visualViewport API for tooltip positioning
- Calculate clamped positions based on visible viewport bounds
- Add safe-area-inset support for tooltip maxWidth
- Wrap tooltip in IIFE for computed positioning values

FeatureTour.tsx:
- Use visualViewport API for tour popover positioning
- Calculate position bounds accounting for viewport offset
- Ensure popovers stay within visible area on all edges
- Add safe-area-inset support for popover width

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)
